messages.content: You are a SQL expert. Return only the SQL query based on the schema provided.

Schema: department (deptid, deptname, location, name, head_id, head_age) | teacher (teacherid, firstname, lastname, email, deptid) | subject (subjectid, subjectname, credits, teacherid) | student (studentid, firstname, lastname, dob, deptid) | enrollment (enrollmentid, studentid, subjectid, grade, semester)
Question: List the names of all departments located in 'Building A'.
SELECT deptname FROM department WHERE location = 'Building A';
You are a SQL expert. Return only the SQL query based on the schema provided.

Schema: department (deptid, deptname, location, name, head_id, head_age) | teacher (teacherid, firstname, lastname, email, deptid) | subject (subjectid, subjectname, credits, teacherid) | student (studentid, firstname, lastname, dob, deptid) | enrollment (enrollmentid, studentid, subjectid, grade, semester)
Question: Show the first and last names of students born after January 1st, 2005.
SELECT firstname, lastname FROM student WHERE dob > '2005-01-01';
You are a SQL expert. Return only the SQL query based on the schema provided.

Schema: department (deptid, deptname, location, name, head_id, head_age) | teacher (teacherid, firstname, lastname, email, deptid) | subject (subjectid, subjectname, credits, teacherid) | student (studentid, firstname, lastname, dob, deptid) | enrollment (enrollmentid, studentid, subjectid, grade, semester)
Question: How many teachers are in the 'Mathematics' department?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teacher JOIN department ON teacher.deptid = department.deptid WHERE department.deptname = 'Mathematics';
You are a SQL expert. Return only the SQL query based on the schema provided.

Schema: department (deptid, deptname, location, name, head_id, head_age) | teacher (teacherid, firstname, lastname, email, deptid) | subject (subjectid, subjectname, credits, teacherid) | student (studentid, firstname, lastname, dob, deptid) | enrollment (enrollmentid, studentid, subjectid, grade, semester)
Question: List all subject names along with the last name of the teacher who teaches them.
SELECT s.subjectname, t.lastname FROM subject s JOIN teacher t ON s.teacherid = t.teacherid;
You are a SQL expert. Return only the SQL query based on the schema provided.

Schema: department (deptid, deptname, location, name, head_id, head_age) | teacher (teacherid, firstname, lastname, email, deptid) | subject (subjectid, subjectname, credits, teacherid) | student (studentid, firstname, lastname, dob, deptid) | enrollment (enrollmentid, studentid, subjectid, grade, semester)
Question: Find the first and last names of students who received an 'A' grade in any semester.
SELECT DISTINCT s.firstname, s.lastname FROM student s JOIN enrollment e ON s.studentid = e.studentid WHERE e.grade = 'A';
You are a SQL expert. Return only the SQL query based on the schema provided.

Question: What is the average age of the department heads?
SELECT AVG(head_age) FROM department;

Schema: department (deptid, deptname, location, name, head_id, head_age) | teacher (teacherid, firstname, lastname, email, deptid) | subject (subjectid, subjectname, credits, teacherid) | student (studentid, firstname, lastname, dob, deptid) | enrollment (enrollmentid, studentid, subjectid, grade, semester)
Question: Which subjects provide more than 3 credits?
SELECT subjectname FROM subject WHERE credits > 3;

Schema: department (deptid, deptname, location, name, head_id, head_age) | teacher (teacherid, firstname, lastname, email, deptid) | subject (subjectid, subjectname, credits, teacherid) | student (studentid, firstname, lastname, dob, deptid) | enrollment (enrollmentid, studentid, subjectid, grade, semester)
Question: Which students are enrolled in subjects taught by 'Dr. Smith'?

SELECT DISTINCT s.firstname, s.lastname FROM student s JOIN enrollment e ON s.studentid = e.studentid JOIN subject sub ON e.subjectid = sub.subjectid JOIN teacher t ON sub.teacherid = t.teacherid WHERE t.lastname = 'Smith';
You are a SQL expert. Return only the SQL query based on the schema provided.

Schema: department (deptid, deptname, location, name, head_id, head_age) | teacher (teacherid, firstname, lastname, email, deptid) | subject (subjectid, subjectname, credits, teacherid) | student (studentid, firstname, lastname, dob, deptid) | enrollment (enrollmentid, studentid, subjectid, grade, semester)
Question: Find all subjects and their credit counts for students in the 'Physics' department.

SELECT DISTINCT sub.subjectname, sub.credits FROM subject sub JOIN enrollment e ON sub.subjectid = e.subjectid JOIN student s ON e.studentid = s.studentid JOIN department d ON s.deptid = d.deptid WHERE d.deptname = 'Physics';
You are a SQL expert. Return only the SQL query based on the schema provided.

Schema: department (deptid, deptname, location, name, head_id, head_age) | teacher (teacherid, firstname, lastname, email, deptid) | subject (subjectid, subjectname, credits, teacherid) | student (studentid, firstname, lastname, dob, deptid) | enrollment (enrollmentid, studentid, subjectid, grade, semester)
Question: Show the average grade for each subject in the 'Spring' semester.
SELECT subjectid, AVG(CAST(grade AS FLOAT)) FROM enrollment WHERE semester = 'Spring' GROUP BY subjectid;
You are a SQL expert. Return only the SQL query based on the schema provided.

Schema: department (deptid, deptname, location, name, head_id, head_age) | teacher (teacherid, firstname, lastname, email, deptid) | subject (subjectid, subjectname, credits, teacherid) | student (studentid, firstname, lastname, dob, deptid) | enrollment (enrollmentid, studentid, subjectid, grade, semester)
Question: List departments that have more than 50 students enrolled.
SELECT d.deptname FROM department d JOIN student s ON d.deptid = s.deptid GROUP BY d.deptid, d.deptname HAVING COUNT(s.studentid) > 50;
You are a SQL expert. Return only the SQL query based on the schema provided.

Schema: department (deptid, deptname, location, name, head_id, head_age) | teacher (teacherid, firstname, lastname, email, deptid) | subject (subjectid, subjectname, credits, teacherid) | student (studentid, firstname, lastname, dob, deptid) | enrollment (enrollmentid, studentid, subjectid, grade, semester)
Question: Who are the top 3 oldest students in the Computer Science department?
SELECT firstname, lastname, dob FROM student s JOIN department d ON s.deptid = d.deptid WHERE d.deptname = 'Computer Science' ORDER BY dob ASC LIMIT 3;
You are a SQL expert. Return only the SQL query based on the schema provided.

Question: Get all teachers whose email addresses end with '@university.edu'.
SELECT firstname, lastname FROM teacher WHERE email LIKE '%@university.edu';

Question: Find students who have not enrolled in any subjects yet.
SELECT firstname, lastname FROM student WHERE studentid NOT IN (SELECT studentid FROM enrollment);
You are a SQL expert. Return only the SQL query based on the schema provided.

Schema: department (deptid, deptname, location, name, head_id, head_age) | teacher (teacherid, firstname, lastname, email, deptid) | subject (subjectid, subjectname, credits, teacherid) | student (studentid, firstname, lastname, dob, deptid) | enrollment (enrollmentid, studentid, subjectid, grade, semester)
Question: Identify departments where the head's age is greater than the average head age of all departments.
SELECT name FROM department WHERE head_age > (SELECT AVG(head_age) FROM department);
